title: Job Opening Teacher at Career Launcher

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at Career Launcher
jsonLd.description:
Join the Career Launcher family as a Teacher in Gurgaon. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Career Launcher:
Career Launcher is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Career Launcher!
